description: A wide graphic on a dark blue background with a faint enlarged Department of Homeland Security seal watermark on the right. The small color DHS seal and U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services wordmark sit at the upper left. Bold white text reads NEWS RELEASE, with an italic serif headline below reading DHS Changes Process for Awarding H-1B Work Visas to Better Protect American Workers.
notable_text: NEWS RELEASE; DHS Changes Process for Awarding H-1B Work Visas to Better Protect American Workers; U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services
